meta.title: Modbus Secure Update from S4x18
meta.description:
David Smith of Schneider Electric gives an update on the status of Modbus Secure. This takes one of the first and most widely deployed ICS protocols and wraps it in TLS 1.2 to add security.

X.509 certificates are used to provide identity authentication, and importantly it includes a user role. And Schneider Electric has a simple CA product they are selling.

David goes over the Modbus Secure interoperability testing from May 2017, including performance information, lessons learned and future improvements.

And a skeptical Andrew Ginter asks many questions.
